data.name: Fuck the Infected 🧟
data.detailed_description:
It’s a post-apocalyptic world, and Eden can’t help but explore it. Some of these things, she’s never seen. But her carelessness has her quickly finding the sort of trouble she was trained to avoid. This creature, though, hungers for something besides the feel of her meat between his teeth. Instead, he wants her wetting his fingers, he wants to taste her on his tongue. And he wants Eden to please him in ways she’s never dreamt of before!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures of girls with demonic creatures

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Zombie

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphic

• Girl's and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

data.short_description: Eden’s sense of adventure has put her in a difficult place in this post-apocalyptic world. She’s suddenly discovered a creature that hungers for something besides her brains and the meat on her bones. Well, he wants her flesh, but what he wants to do with it is something Eden may not mind after all.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
